Yahia Fofana.bio: Young Ivorian goalkeeper who has established himself as a first-team regular at Angers in Ligue 1. Part of the new generation of Ivorian talent building toward the 2026 World Cup.
Yahia Fofana.playingStyle: Athletic, modern goalkeeper with sharp reflexes and confident handling
Yahia Fofana.worldCup2026Role: Starting goalkeeper or strong contender for the number one spot
Yahia Fofana.notableFact: Emerged as Ivory Coast's first-choice keeper during the AFCON 2023 campaign on home soil

Serge Aurier.bio: Experienced Ivorian right-back who has played at the highest level with Tottenham Hotspur and Paris Saint-Germain. A leader in the dressing room with over 85 caps.
Serge Aurier.playingStyle: Attack-minded right-back who drives forward, delivers crosses, and gets involved in the final third
Serge Aurier.worldCup2026Role: Veteran defensive leader providing experience and attacking threat from right-back
Serge Aurier.notableFact: Won multiple Ligue 1 titles with PSG and played in the Champions League knockout rounds with Tottenham

Ghislain Konan.bio: Solid Ivorian left-back who has been a reliable performer at Reims in Ligue 1. Known for his defensive discipline and ability to support attacks down the left flank.
Ghislain Konan.playingStyle: Dependable left-back who balances defensive duties with overlapping runs
Ghislain Konan.worldCup2026Role: Starting left-back providing defensive stability and width on the left side
Ghislain Konan.notableFact: Has been one of the most consistent full-backs in Ligue 1 during his time at Reims

Odilon Kossounou.bio: Athletic young center-back who has impressed at Bayer Leverkusen in the Bundesliga. Came through the Bruges academy in Belgium before earning a big move to Germany.
Odilon Kossounou.playingStyle: Quick, powerful center-back who defends aggressively and carries the ball forward with confidence
Odilon Kossounou.worldCup2026Role: Starting center-back and key defensive figure with his pace and physicality
Odilon Kossounou.notableFact: Was part of Bayer Leverkusen's historic unbeaten Bundesliga season in 2023-24

Willy Boly.bio: Experienced center-back who has spent years in the Premier League with Wolverhampton Wanderers and Nottingham Forest. Provides aerial presence and defensive reliability.
Willy Boly.playingStyle: Strong, physical center-back who dominates in the air and defends with aggression
Willy Boly.worldCup2026Role: Experienced defensive option providing depth and Premier League-hardened quality
Willy Boly.notableFact: Was a key player in Wolverhampton Wanderers' return to the Premier League and their impressive debut top-flight seasons

Seko Fofana.bio: Powerful Ivorian midfielder who was named Ligue 1 Player of the Season with Lens before a big move. Combines brute strength with surprising technical finesse.
Seko Fofana.playingStyle: Powerful box-to-box midfielder who drives through challenges and surges forward with the ball
Seko Fofana.worldCup2026Role: Key midfielder whose power and drive provide the engine for Ivory Coast's play
Seko Fofana.notableFact: Won the Ligue 1 Player of the Season award for his outstanding performances at Lens

Maxwel Cornet.bio: Versatile Ivorian winger who has played in the Premier League with West Ham and Burnley after a successful spell at Lyon. Capable of playing across the front line or at left-back.
Maxwel Cornet.playingStyle: Versatile left-sided attacker who cuts inside on his right foot and strikes with power
Maxwel Cornet.worldCup2026Role: Utility player who can feature on the wing or at full-back depending on tactical needs
Maxwel Cornet.notableFact: Scored memorable goals against Manchester City in the Champions League during his time at Lyon

Franck Kessié.bio: Former AC Milan midfield powerhouse who was a cornerstone of their Serie A title-winning team. A dominant physical presence who controls the midfield with his strength and energy.
Franck Kessié.playingStyle: Powerful, box-to-box midfielder who dominates physical battles and contributes goals from midfield
Franck Kessié.worldCup2026Role: Starting central midfielder and one of the squad's most experienced and decorated players
Franck Kessié.notableFact: Was instrumental in AC Milan's Serie A title win in 2022, their first league championship in over a decade

Sébastien Haller.bio: Ivorian striker who made headlines with his incredible Champions League campaign at Ajax, scoring in nearly every match. Battled testicular cancer and made a courageous return to football.
Sébastien Haller.playingStyle: Strong target man who excels in hold-up play, aerial duels, and clinical finishing inside the box
Sébastien Haller.worldCup2026Role: Experienced striker option whose hold-up play and aerial threat provide a different attacking dimension
Sébastien Haller.notableFact: Overcame testicular cancer in 2022 and made an inspirational return to professional football, earning worldwide admiration

Ibrahim Sangaré.bio: Imposing Ivorian midfielder who has been a standout in the Premier League with Nottingham Forest after excelling at PSV Eindhoven. A midfield colossus who controls games.
Ibrahim Sangaré.playingStyle: Tall, commanding midfielder who dominates through physicality, long-range passing, and defensive screening
Ibrahim Sangaré.worldCup2026Role: Starting midfielder and one of Ivory Coast's most important players, controlling the midfield battle
Ibrahim Sangaré.notableFact: His move to Nottingham Forest made him one of the most expensive Ivorian players in transfer history

Simon Adingra.bio: Explosive young Ivorian winger who has been a revelation at Brighton in the Premier League. His pace and directness have made him one of the most exciting young players in the league.
Simon Adingra.playingStyle: Lightning-fast winger who beats defenders with raw pace and skill before delivering end product
Simon Adingra.worldCup2026Role: Key attacking weapon whose pace and directness can unlock any defense in the tournament
Simon Adingra.notableFact: Was named Best Young Player at the 2023 Africa Cup of Nations, which Ivory Coast won on home soil

Ali Badra.bio: Ivorian goalkeeper plying his trade in South African football with Mamelodi Sundowns. Provides depth to the goalkeeping department with his experience in African club football.
Ali Badra.playingStyle: Solid, reliable goalkeeper with good positioning and experience in African competition
Ali Badra.worldCup2026Role: Backup goalkeeper providing squad depth behind the first and second choice
Ali Badra.notableFact: Has played in the CAF Champions League with Mamelodi Sundowns, one of Africa's most successful clubs

Eric Bailly.bio: Former Manchester United center-back who was once one of the Premier League's most exciting young defenders. Has battled injuries throughout his career but remains a talented and aggressive defender.
Eric Bailly.playingStyle: Aggressive, fearless center-back who makes last-ditch tackles and takes risks to win the ball
Eric Bailly.worldCup2026Role: Experienced defensive option who brings Premier League quality and aggressive defending
Eric Bailly.notableFact: Was Manchester United's first signing under Jose Mourinho and cost a reported 30 million pounds

Evan Ndicka.bio: Rising French-born Ivorian center-back who has established himself at Roma in Serie A after impressive performances at Eintracht Frankfurt. A left-footed defender with a bright future.
Evan Ndicka.playingStyle: Left-footed center-back who is comfortable on the ball, good in the air, and progressive with his passing
Evan Ndicka.worldCup2026Role: Starting center-back whose left foot and passing quality balance the defensive line
Evan Ndicka.notableFact: Won the Europa League with Eintracht Frankfurt in 2022, one of the biggest surprises in European football history

Hamed Traoré.bio: Skilful Ivorian attacking midfielder who has played in Serie A with Sassuolo and Napoli. A creative spark with excellent dribbling ability and vision.
Hamed Traoré.playingStyle: Creative, dribbling midfielder who picks passes in tight spaces and drives at defenses
Hamed Traoré.worldCup2026Role: Creative midfield option who can unlock defenses with his skill and vision
Hamed Traoré.notableFact: Represented Italy at youth level before switching his allegiance to Ivory Coast at senior level

Jean Michaël Seri.bio: Experienced Ivorian midfielder who was once dubbed the 'African Xavi' during his brilliant spell at Nice in Ligue 1. Has since played in England with Fulham and Hull City.
Jean Michaël Seri.playingStyle: Technically excellent midfielder who keeps possession, sprays passes, and controls the tempo
Jean Michaël Seri.worldCup2026Role: Experienced squad midfielder who can step in to provide control and technical quality
Jean Michaël Seri.notableFact: Was courted by Barcelona during his peak years at Nice and was nicknamed the 'African Xavi' for his passing ability

Emmanuel Agbadou.bio: Tall, physical Ivorian center-back who has developed well at Reims in Ligue 1. A dominant aerial presence who is growing into one of Ivory Coast's most reliable defenders.
Emmanuel Agbadou.playingStyle: Physically imposing center-back who wins aerial duels and defends with strength and timing
Emmanuel Agbadou.worldCup2026Role: Defensive rotation option who provides aerial dominance and physical presence
Emmanuel Agbadou.notableFact: Has been part of Ivory Coast's defensive resurgence heading into the 2026 World Cup cycle

Oumar Diakité.bio: Young, energetic Ivorian midfielder emerging at Reims in Ligue 1. Represents the exciting next wave of Ivorian midfield talent with his dynamism and technical ability.
Oumar Diakité.playingStyle: Dynamic young midfielder who presses aggressively, carries the ball forward, and contributes in both halves
Oumar Diakité.worldCup2026Role: Young midfield option bringing energy and dynamism from the bench
Oumar Diakité.notableFact: Was part of Ivory Coast's victorious AFCON 2023 squad, gaining early international tournament experience

Nicolas Pépé.bio: Former record signing at Arsenal who dazzled in Ligue 1 with Lille before his big Premier League move. A left-footed winger with a reputation for spectacular goals.
Nicolas Pépé.playingStyle: Tricky left-footed winger who cuts inside from the right and shoots with devastating power and curl
Nicolas Pépé.worldCup2026Role: Experienced wide attacker who can provide quality and goals from the right wing
Nicolas Pépé.notableFact: Was Arsenal's record signing at 72 million pounds and scored 16 goals to help Lille finish second in Ligue 1

Karim Konaté.bio: Exciting young Ivorian striker who has been prolific at Red Bull Salzburg. A left-footed forward with natural finishing ability and the potential to become a star.
Karim Konaté.playingStyle: Clinical young striker with sharp movement, a lethal left foot, and composure in front of goal
Karim Konaté.worldCup2026Role: Exciting young striking talent who can make an impact as a starter or from the bench
Karim Konaté.notableFact: Has scored prolifically in Austrian football and the Champions League qualifiers at a very young age

Jean-Philippe Gbamin.bio: Experienced Ivorian defensive midfielder who had a difficult spell at Everton due to injuries before rebuilding his career in Turkey with Trabzonspor.
Jean-Philippe Gbamin.playingStyle: Combative defensive midfielder who shields the defense and wins aerial and ground duels
Jean-Philippe Gbamin.worldCup2026Role: Midfield depth option providing defensive solidity and physical presence
Jean-Philippe Gbamin.notableFact: Despite serious injury setbacks at Everton, he rebuilt his career and earned his way back into the Ivorian squad

Eliezer Ira.bio: Ivorian goalkeeper who has been playing in Swedish football with Djurgardens IF. Provides additional depth to the goalkeeping pool with his experience in Scandinavian football.
Eliezer Ira.playingStyle: Agile goalkeeper with good footwork and sharp reactions
Eliezer Ira.worldCup2026Role: Third-choice goalkeeper providing squad depth and training competition
Eliezer Ira.notableFact: Has established himself in the Swedish Allsvenskan, one of Scandinavia's top leagues

Wilfried Zaha.bio: Iconic Ivorian winger known for his electrifying time at Crystal Palace in the Premier League. One of the most feared dribblers in English football history, now playing in MLS.
Wilfried Zaha.playingStyle: Explosive, skillful winger who drives at defenders with pace and power, drawing fouls and creating chances
Wilfried Zaha.worldCup2026Role: Experienced wide attacker whose dribbling ability and Premier League pedigree provide a valuable option
Wilfried Zaha.notableFact: Spent over a decade at Crystal Palace becoming their greatest modern player, and won three penalties in a single Premier League match

Christian Kouamé.bio: Versatile Ivorian forward who has been a consistent contributor at Fiorentina in Serie A. Combines pace with intelligent movement and can play across the front line.
Christian Kouamé.playingStyle: Versatile, mobile forward who stretches defenses with runs and contributes to link-up play
Christian Kouamé.worldCup2026Role: Attacking utility player who can feature in multiple positions across the forward line
Christian Kouamé.notableFact: Recovered from a serious ACL injury to rebuild his career and become a regular at Fiorentina

Jérémie Boga.bio: Technically gifted Ivorian winger who developed in Chelsea's academy before making his name in Serie A with Sassuolo. Known for his mesmerizing close control and dribbling ability.
Jérémie Boga.playingStyle: Silky, technical winger who drifts past opponents with close control and creates in tight spaces
Jérémie Boga.worldCup2026Role: Creative wide option whose technical quality can unlock packed defenses
Jérémie Boga.notableFact: Came through Chelsea's academy alongside several future England internationals before pursuing his career in Italy

Ousmane Diomandé.bio: Young, exciting Ivorian center-back who has quickly established himself at Sporting CP in Portugal. One of the most promising young defenders in European football.
Ousmane Diomandé.playingStyle: Athletic, ball-playing young center-back who defends proactively and carries the ball out from the back
Ousmane Diomandé.worldCup2026Role: Starting center-back or key rotation player whose youth and quality make him a future cornerstone
Ousmane Diomandé.notableFact: Earned a move to Sporting CP at just 20 years old and has attracted interest from some of Europe's biggest clubs
